scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static SMPL website ready for Vercel')"
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['index.html','styles.css','script.js','vercel.json','privacy.html','cookies.html','legal.html','Design.md','logo_smpl.avif','assets/logo.svg','assets/og-image.svg']; required.forEach((file)=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(file+' missing') }); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); ['#services','#work','#about','#blog','#book','#faq'].forEach((anchor)=>{ if(!html.includes('id=\"'+anchor.slice(1)+'\"')) throw new Error(anchor+' target missing') }); console.log('Static checks passed')"
